title: anthemis caucasica
intro: Anthemis caucasica, also known as Caucasian chamomile or mountain chamomile, is a flowering plant belonging to the daisy family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat wounds, skin irritations, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Anthemis caucasica include reducing anxiety and promoting relaxation, as well as having antimicrobial properties that can help combat infections. Herbal preparations of Anthemis caucasica include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
